summary: Iteration 113 - Bugfix verification for footer stability and guest header language selector. ALL TESTS PASSED. Both bugs from iteration 112 are now fixed.

footer_stability.description: Footer remains visible continuously at 0s, 5s, 8s, 12s intervals. Using FALLBACK content (4 columns: Güven & Politika, Kurumsal, Bilgi Merkezi, Sistem)

fallback_footer_active.description: Fallback footer (site-footer-fallback-links) is visible and all 4 sections are present with links
fallback_footer_active.note: API likely returns insufficient link_groups (<6 links) so fallback logic at line 109 correctly activates fallback

guest_header_language_selector.description: Language selector with TR/DE/FR buttons is visible in guest header and functional
guest_header_language_selector.functionality: Language switching works correctly - DE shows German labels (Anmelden, Registrieren, Suche), FR shows French labels (Connexion, S'inscrire, Rechercher)

no_error_boundary_crash.description: No ErrorBoundary crash detected on homepage load

issue_1_footer_disappearing.previous_status: REPORTED (iteration_112 footer stable but issue flagged as concern)
issue_1_footer_disappearing.current_status: FIXED - Footer remains visible after 8+ seconds
issue_1_footer_disappearing.fix_location: SiteFooter.jsx - fallback logic lines 76-109 with stricter conditions (hasMenuLinkGroups, menuLinkCount >= 6)

issue_2_language_selector_missing.current_status: FIXED - Language selector visible and functional
issue_2_language_selector_missing.fix_location: SiteHeader.jsx - Line 13 (default supportedLanguages = ['tr', 'de', 'fr']), Line 172 (fallback in renderLanguageSelector), Line 284 (conditional render for guests)

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console shows [i18n_missing_key] warnings for header_login, header_register, header_search_placeholder in tr locale - translations should be added to i18n files
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bugs fixed and verified. Footer uses fallback content (4 columns with links), guest header shows TR/DE/FR language selector that properly switches languages. Service worker unregister logic added to index.js (lines 44-50).

rca_of_the_issue.issue_1_footer_disappearing_fix: Footer fallback conditions (lines 76-109) now check: hasRenderableRows, hasMenuLinkGroups, menuLinkCount >= 6. If any fail, fallback footer renders. This ensures footer always has content.
rca_of_the_issue.issue_2_language_selector_fix: Added default value ['tr', 'de', 'fr'] at destructuring (line 13) and fallback in renderLanguageSelector (line 172). Language selector now renders correctly for guest users at line 284.
